name: Robert Frasier
answer1:
My Lady Beth can
tell thee more!
answer2:
I know but
one of three
syllables.
question:
Dost thou wish
to know it now?
yes:
It is 'ver'! Seek
ye now the
other parts!

name: Beth Frasier
answer2:
Our people
believe in truth
as a way of life
and live it to
the fullest!
question:
Dost thou
seek truth?
no:
Then thou shalt
not find it!

name: a guard
job:
Guard the gate,
guard the baron,
guard the
baroness, watch
the towers....
answer1:
I have been here
for hours!
question:
See why
I'm tired?
yes:
It's hard work
and long hours
in the baronial
guard!

name: Palamar
job:
I am an old
wizard, but have
much to show!
health:
My bones ache
but my mind
is sharp!
answer2:
Search there by
the end, thou
shalt find
a knob.
question:
Dost thou
see where?
yes:
Set the dial and
thou shalt see!

name: Father Antos
look:
An old druid,
who looks
strangely
familiar.
health:
Old and frail,
I've seen many
quests!
answer2:
Seek ye the book
of truth where
other books lie.
question:
Art thou on
the quest?

name: Jon
answer2:
There are four
townes that
follow the
principle of
truth.
question: Know which?
no:
There are
eight possible
combinations of
the three
principles,
there are eight
cities!

name: Scatu
look:
A tall mage
wearing strange
armour.
answer1:
Thou would be
well advised to
visit the Seer
often!
question:
Art thou a
partial avatar?
yes:
When thou art 8
parts avatar,
seek Zircon in
Minoc and ask of
mystics!

name: Estro
health:
Why I am fine,
you too I hope.
answer1:
I am looking for
the book of
justice!
question:
Hast thou never
committed *any*
crime!?
yes:
I believe thou
art boasting
a lie!
no:
Then speak to
the judge in
Yew!

name: Tymus
answer1:
Yes, welcome to
the Lycaeum, the
keep of truth!
answer2:
The dungeon
altar rooms need
4 stones each!
question:
Know ye how many
cities follow
the principles
of truth?

name:
a truth
seeker.
health:
I am in a
meditative
state.
answer1:
The principle
upon which I
meditate.
answer2:
Meditate at each
shrine for 1, 2
and 3 minutes,
then shalt thou
know the paths
of goodness!
question: A

name: a fighter
answer2:
I lost in a
dungeon altar
room!
question:
Hast thou
seen one?
yes:
Notice that
each of the
three rooms
connect to four
dungeons each!
no:
They connect the
dungeons unto
each other!

name: Lord Terence
answer1:
Herein is the
largest store
of knowledge in
Britannia except
the codex!
question:
Art thou looking
for a particular
book?

name: Zajac
answer2:
Because my
friend Chuckles
won't tell me
his secret!
question:
Dost thou know
chuckles?
yes:
Why dost thou
not ask him for
his clue!
no:
He lives in
the castle
Britannia ask
him of his clue!

name: Catriona
answer1:
The treasures
are of great
value!
question:
Dost thou intend
to steal?

name:
Nigel, at thy
service.
answer2:
Yes,
resurrection
it takes: ash,
ginseng, garlic,
silk, bloodmoss,
and mandrake!
question:
Dost thou know
what it is?
yes:
What do I call
the spell?

name: Shylock the Meek
job:
I sit and beg
oh... please...
health:
I am cold
and sick!
oh... please...
answer1:
Yes, please
give me money!
oh... please...
question:
Wilt thou
help me?
Oh... please...
